title: Doktor.se - Multi-Country Digital Healthcare Platform
problem: Healthcare access fragmented across digital and physical channels. Need for integrated telemedicine and physical healthcare centers.
solution: Hybrid platform combining digital telemedicine with physical healthcare centers. Operates across multiple European countries. Also powers veterinary care (AniCura).
technology: Telemedicine, hybrid care model, multi-country platform, veterinary health tech
target_customer: Patients, employers, healthcare systems, veterinary clinics
traction_signals: Owns both digital platform and physical health centers
regulatory_notes: Operates across multiple EU jurisdictions. Each market has specific telemedicine regulations.
varden_fit: MODERATE-HIGH - Direct hybrid care model similar to Varden's vision. Multi-country expansion experience valuable. Veterinary side less relevant but shows platform flexibility. Potential for knowledge sharing or selective partnership.
notes: Tencent backing = significant resources. Multi-country operational experience valuable. Research: which countries, revenue breakdown, veterinary vs human health split.
